title: BBC Home - Breaking News, World News, US News, Sports, Business, Innovation, Climate, Culture, Travel, Video & Audio
content:
US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
Trump says he 'loves the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
Water cannon fired in latest disorder after Belfast knife attack
The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
Knicks owner clashes with Mamdani over tight security, cancelling NBA Finals watch party
Canada proposes teen s...

metadata.description: Visit BBC for trusted reporting on the latest world and US news, sports, business, climate, innovation, culture and much more.
